sections.experience: experienced Senior Tax Analyst to be part of and contribute to our dynamic business. The Tax Senior will be an important contributor to the Tax Team and will help manage our Vertex instance, perform data analysis, compile data for global information reporting and/or tax compliance, support AI and other automation efforts, and contribute to our overall tax compliance and operational excellence. You will report to the Tax Director that leads the tax operations and tax compliance teams. As Twitch continues to grow its live streaming platform with our amazing social community, we are looking for a candidate with project management experience who will support our business and community through deployment of their technical tax knowledge and skills, and collaboration with cross \-functional teams. You can work in Seattle, WA or San Francisco, CA. You Will * Partner with internal business partners on the collection, preparation, and submission of global information reporting forms * Assist in the maintenance, operation, and configuration of Vertex for Twitch * Support continuing efforts to incorporate AI and other scalable automation into existing tax compliance and reporting processes * Partner with Tax Team members on complex data driven projects * Assist with other system implementation projects and New Product Initiatives * Assist in the preparation of Forms 1099 and 1042S * Prepare and analyze monthly reconciliation of transaction upload reports to revenue reports, and reconciliation of indirect tax accounts for financial reporting * Partner with the Tax Team to respond to tax inquiries from customers, vendors, and internal departments * Partner with internal business partners on the collection, preparation, and submission of indirect tax, DST, SALT, and other gross receipts or transactional tax compliance as requested * Help with other ad hoc tax compliance, operations and/or planning projects as requested Perks * Medical, Dental, Vision \& Disability Insurance * 401(k) * Maternity \& Parental Leave * Flexible PTO * Amazon Employee Discount **BASIC Experience in an ERP environment (SAP and/or Oracle) * 4\+ years of experience in tax (Big 4 or Tech Industry) * Significant experience in Vertex (including rule mapping, transaction testing, MDU/SR updates, and systems integration of Vertex) * Proficiency in Alteryx * Proficiency with productivity tools (Microsoft Suite, Google Workspace) * Proficiency with tax research tools (CCH, RIA, and BNA) **PREFERRED Experience with large data set analysis and summarization Twitch is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Los Angeles County applicants: Job experience,

sections.about: About Us: Twitch is the world’s biggest live streaming service, with global communities built around gaming, entertainment, music, sports, cooking, and more. It is where thousands of communities come together for whatever, every day. We’re about community, inside and out. You’ll find coworkers who are eager to team up, collaborate, and smash (or elegantly solve) problems together. sections.experience: Experiences AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying. Why AWS? Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses. Inclusive Team Culture Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (gender diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness. Mentorship \& Career Growth We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional. Work/Life Balance We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.**BASIC experience with cloud infrastructure technologies * Experience communicating complex ideas to technical and non\-technical audiences * Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Information Technology, a related technical field or equivalent experience * 6\+ years of direct experience working with customers on cloud technology adoption AND/OR 6\+ years of direct experience working in cybersecurity, security operations, networking, threat detection, incident response, endpoint, or identity and access management (IAM). **PREFERRED Experience developing detailed go to market plans * Experience demonstrating strong analytical abilities and confidence in the use of data * MBA, or Master's degree in management, business administration, economics, engineering, marketing * Track record of creating compelling technical demonstrations and reference architectures * Experience presenting to executive\-level audiences and industry analysts Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Los Angeles County applicants: Job experience,

sections.experience: experienced Senior Tax Analyst to be part of and contribute to our dynamic business. The Tax Senior will be an important contributor to the Tax Team and will help manage our Vertex instance, perform data analysis, compile data for global information reporting and/or tax compliance, support AI and other automation efforts, and contribute to our overall tax compliance and operational excellence. You will report to the Tax Director that leads the tax operations and tax compliance teams. As Twitch continues to grow its live streaming platform with our amazing social community, we are looking for a candidate with project management experience who will support our business and community through deployment of their technical tax knowledge and skills, and collaboration with cross \-functional teams. You can work in Seattle, WA or San Francisco, CA. You Will * Partner with internal business partners on the collection, preparation, and submission of global information reporting forms * Assist in the maintenance, operation, and configuration of Vertex for Twitch * Support continuing efforts to incorporate AI and other scalable automation into existing tax compliance and reporting processes * Partner with Tax Team members on complex data driven projects * Assist with other system implementation projects and New Product Initiatives * Assist in the preparation of Forms 1099 and 1042S * Prepare and analyze monthly reconciliation of transaction upload reports to revenue reports, and reconciliation of indirect tax accounts for financial reporting * Partner with the Tax Team to respond to tax inquiries from customers, vendors, and internal departments * Partner with internal business partners on the collection, preparation, and submission of indirect tax, DST, SALT, and other gross receipts or transactional tax compliance as requested * Help with other ad hoc tax compliance, operations and/or planning projects as requested Perks * Medical, Dental, Vision \& Disability Insurance * 401(k) * Maternity \& Parental Leave * Flexible PTO * Amazon Employee Discount **BASIC Experience in an ERP environment (SAP and/or Oracle) * 4\+ years of experience in tax (Big 4 or Tech Industry) * Significant experience in Vertex (including rule mapping, transaction testing, MDU/SR updates, and systems integration of Vertex) * Proficiency in Alteryx * Proficiency with productivity tools (Microsoft Suite, Google Workspace) * Proficiency with tax research tools (CCH, RIA, and BNA) **PREFERRED Experience with large data set analysis and summarization Twitch is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Los Angeles County applicants: Job experience,

sections.experience: Experiences AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying. Why AWS? Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses. Inclusive Team Culture Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (gender diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness. Mentorship \& Career Growth We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional. Work/Life Balance We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud. **BASIC experience * Bachelor's degree in a relevant field or equivalent work experience * Experience conveying complex technical concepts to both technical and business audiences **PREFERRED Experience shaping business strategy for technical products or services for large enterprises or partners * Experience demonstrating strong analytical abilities and confidence in the use of data * MBA, or Master's degree * Experience with AWS (or other provider) container management/serverless offerings * Track record of creating compelling technical demonstrations and reference architectures * Experience presenting to executive\-level audiences and industry analysts Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Los Angeles County applicants: Job experience,
sections.benefits: compensation will be determined based on factors including benefits including health insurance (medical, dental, vision, prescription, Basic Life \& AD\&D insurance and option for Supplemental life plans, EAP, Mental Health Support, Medical Advice Line, Flexible Spending Accounts, Adoption and Surrogacy Reimbursement coverage), 401(k) matching, paid time off, and parental leave. Learn more about our benefits at https://amazon.jobs/en/ benefits. sections.experience: Experiences AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying. Why AWS? Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses. Inclusive Team Culture Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (gender diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness. Mentorship \& Career Growth We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional. Work/Life Balance We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.**BASIC experience * 5\+ years of direct experience working with customers on cloud technology adoption * 5\+ years of hands\-on experience with cloud architectures in technical domains (e.g., AI/ML, Analytics, Observability, APM, Developer Tools) * Demonstrated experience creating technical content and delivering technical presentations to diverse audiences **PREFERRED Experience developing go\-to\-market strategies for technical products * Track record of creating compelling technical demonstrations and reference architectures * Strong data analysis skills with ability to synthesize insights from multiple source * MBA degree * Experience presenting to executive\-level audiences and industry analysts Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Los Angeles County applicants: Job experience,

Learn more about our benefits at https://amazon.jobs/en/ benefits. sections.responsibilities: responsibilities * Partner with product management and GTM teams to develop portfolio\-level strategy documents and guide AWS service prioritization * Create and own positioning and messaging that clearly articulates value propositions to customers * Analyze and synthesize market data from multiple sources (including direct customer feedback) to identify product opportunities and shape portfolio strategy * Lead product launch strategies and associated plans, including naming, target audience definition, and marketing vehicles * Develop technical content including presentations, demonstrations, and reference architectures that educate customers on AWS offerings * Represent AWS as a technical evangelist in executive briefings, industry events, and analyst interactions * Drive field enablement strategies to support product launches, campaigns, and customer success * Align with technical and business leaders on primary cloud and AI use cases for their specific ideal customer profiles; defines best practice architecture and services for each use case About the team Diverse duties for this position include: work safely and cooperatively with other employees, supervisors, and staff; adhere to standards of excellence despite stressful conditions; communicate effectively and respectfully with employees, supervisors, and staff to ensure exceptional customer service; and follow all federal, state, and local laws and Company policies. Criminal history may have a direct, adverse, and negative relationship with some of the material job duties of this position. These include the duties and responsibilities listed above, as well as the abilities to adhere to company policies, exercise sound judgment, effectively manage stress and work safely and respectfully with others, exhibit trustworthiness and professionalism, and safeguard business operations and the Company’s reputation. Pursuant to the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner. The base salary range for this position is listed below. Your Amazon package will include sign\-on payments and restricted stock units (RSUs). Final

sections.responsibilities: responsibilities * Execute the full Request for Quote (RFQ) process, including supporting Statement of Work (SOW) development in collaboration with stakeholders and assisting with bid evaluation and award * Maintain and update procurement records, trackers, and workflow tools to ensure accurate documentation of day\-to\-day sourcing activities * Support cost analysis activities, including gathering and organizing vendor pricing data to inform negotiation and base management strategies * Assist in maintaining Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), Work Instructions, and FAQs for sourcing and vendor management processes; ensure documentation is current and accessible * Support vendor performance tracking by maintaining vendor data and contributing to KPI and metrics reporting * Assist in resolving routine vendor issues, including price disputes and contract order tracking, escalating complex issues as appropriate * Partner with cross\-functional teams to understand deployment
sections.requirements: requirements and ensure vendor activities align with program needs * Identify and flag risks and deviations in vendor performance or procurement workflows; escalate roadblocks to appropriate stakeholders * Contribute to continuous improvement efforts by refining existing processes and supporting operational excellence initiatives A day in the life As a Sourcing Manager on the Vendor Strategy \& Management team, your day centers on keeping our sourcing workflows running smoothly. You'll maintain procurement records, support RFQ execution, and help track vendor performance against defined metrics. You'll collaborate with deployment teams to understand their needs, assist in preparing cost analyses, and ensure SOPs reflect current processes. Whether you're updating a vendor tracker, supporting a bid evaluation, or helping resolve a pricing discrepancy, your attention to detail and follow\-through directly support Amazon's ability to deploy robotics technology at scale. Amazon offers a full range of QUALIFICATIONS** ------------------------ * 2\+ years of program or project management QUALIFICATIONS** ---------------------------- * Knowledge of Lean principles and DMAIC methodology * qualifications, and location. Amazon also offers comprehensive
sections.experience: experiences in ways we can't even imagine yet. RDPI's Strategy \& Operations (S\&O) team is seeking a detail\-oriented and driven Sourcing Manager to support our vendor and procurement operations across North America. This role is responsible for executing sourcing and procurement workflows that support the deployment of Amazon's robotics and packaging technologies through 3P integrator engagement. You will work within defined processes and strategies, contributing to vendor management activities, cost analysis, and procurement execution that keep our deployment programs on track. This position requires up to 25% travel (domestic). Key job experiences, and skillsets. About the team S\&O's Vendor Strategy \& Management service formalizes external and internal partner engagement to drive safe, lean, efficient third\-party vendor operations for technology deployment projects. Our Vendor Lifecycle Management (VLM) process systematically manages the entire vendor relationship, from selection and onboarding to performance monitoring, compliance management, and offboarding. By using quantifiable criteria, we ensure unbiased business award decisions and effective vendor management to control costs, mitigate risks, and build sustainable partnerships.**BASIC experience * 1\+ years of supply chain experience * Experience as procurement/purchasing analyst, or other operational role within a procurement organization * Experience working cross\-functionally with tech and non\-tech teams * Experience using data and metrics to determine and drive improvements * 1\+ years of Excel (including VBA, pivot tables, array functions, power pivots, etc.) and data visualization tools such as Tableau experience **PREFERRED Experience in MS Access and SQL * Experience in requirement gathering and ability to write clear and detailed requirement document * Experience in a procurement organization performing vendor management, contract management, negotiating complex purchases, and bidding * Experience with financial contracts and are comfortable with contractual language * Experience navigating a knowledge base and following Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) * Experience with data querying or modeling with SQL * Experience communicating research findings and analysis in both written and spoken channels * Experience prioritizing and handling multiple assignments at any given time while maintaining commitment to deadlines, or experience in a fast\-paced, high\-tech company Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner. The base salary range for this position is listed below. Your Amazon package will include sign\-on payments and restricted stock units (RSUs). Final experience,

Paid Time Off (PTO) 4\. 401(k) Plan If you are not sure that every qualification on the list above describes you exactly, we'd still love to hear from you! At Amazon, we value people with unique backgrounds, compensation will be determined based on factors including benefits including health insurance (medical, dental, vision, prescription, Basic Life \& AD\&D insurance and option for Supplemental life plans, EAP, Mental Health Support, Medical Advice Line, Flexible Spending Accounts, Adoption and Surrogacy Reimbursement coverage), 401(k) matching, paid time off, and parental leave. Learn more about our benefits at https://amazon.jobs/en/ benefits. sections.responsibilities: responsibilities * Own and develop strategic program frameworks for EiR's high\-impact customer engagement and internal operations initiatives, driving end\-to\-end delivery from design through execution. * Define and implement comprehensive measurement systems to track, report, and continuously improve program effectiveness across EiRBO's portfolio of initiatives. * Drive cross\-organizational alignment and execution of strategic initiatives by influencing and aligning stakeholders. * Proactively identify and mitigate program risks before they impact stakeholder timelines, customer commitments, or business outcomes. * Lead, incubate, and scale new mechanisms and executive engagement programs. * Own monthly and quarterly business reviews and annual planning processes (including budgeting, goaling, and finance cycles), ensuring timely executive\-level communications and briefings. * Develop scalable solutions that accelerate business outcomes, deepen engagement between EiRs and AWS customers' C\-Suite executives, and reduce operational friction over time. * Drive adoption and integration of AI\-powered tools and analytics to surface real\-time insights, improve operational efficiency, and inform strategic decision\-making. * Maintain accurate program documentation, team wikis, and cross\-functional alignment artifacts to ensure continuity and institutional knowledge retention. * Anticipate bottlenecks, manage escalations, make tradeoffs, and balance business needs against constraints across a portfolio of concurrent programs. A day in the life Your day centers around driving the mechanisms and programs that power EiR's global impact. You might start by reviewing engagement data from a recent EiR Campaign to surface insights for an upcoming executive briefing, then shift to aligning cross\-functional stakeholders on a new EBC program framework. Afternoons may involve facilitating a QBR planning session, refining an AI\-powered reporting workflow, or partnering with AWS Marketing and Sales on a joint go\-to\-market initiative. No two days are identical — but each one moves the needle on EiR's ability to engage, influence, and accelerate outcomes for AWS's most strategic customers. About the team The Executive in Residence (EiR) team is a global team composed of former AWS customer CXOs and other senior leaders from within Amazon and AWS who have led foundational transformation and innovation at scale. EiRs serve as trusted guides to AWS customer executives in guiding their own transformation and innovation strategy, and help in developing mental models, frameworks, and strategies to help customers rapidly transform their businesses using the AWS cloud. The EiR Business and Operations (EiRBO) team is responsible for the mechanisms, tools, engagement strategy, insights, communications, and operations that power EiR's impact. Diverse

sections.experience: experience working on cross\-functional projects. The ability to think big, take initiative, influence senior executives, and independently operate with minimal day\-to\-day oversight will be critical. The successful individual will thrive in an entrepreneurial environment and not be hindered by ambiguity or competing priorities. They can roll up their sleeves, dig in, and get the job done. As EiRBO Senior Program Manager, you will anticipate bottlenecks, provide escalation management, and make smart tradeoffs that balance business needs against constraints. An ability to take complex programs and break them down into executable workstreams, develop clear specifications and communications, and deliver results in a timely manner is expected. Maturity, high judgment, the ability to influence, analytical talent, and leadership are essential to success in this role. Key job Experiences AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying. Why AWS? Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses. Work/Life Balance We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why flexible work hours and arrangements are part of our culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud. Inclusive Team Culture Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (gender diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness. Mentorship \& Career Growth We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.**BASIC experience * Experience using data and metrics to determine and drive improvements * Experience owning program strategy, end to end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership * Bachelor's degree * Experience implementing repeatable processes and driving automation or standardization **PREFERRED Experience in complex problem solving, and working in a tight schedule environment * Experience working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams * Experience with AI\-powered productivity and analytics tools and a demonstrated ability to apply them to drive operational efficiency * Strong written and verbal communication skills, with a track record of presenting to senior management and executives Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner. The base salary range for this position is listed below. Your Amazon package will include sign\-on payments and restricted stock units (RSUs). Final experience,

sections.experience: Experiences AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying. Why AWS? Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses. Inclusive Team Culture Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (gender diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness. Mentorship \& Career Growth We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional. Work/Life Balance We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud. **BASIC experience, or degree in advanced technology * Bachelor's degree in a relevant field or equivalent work experience * Experience conveying complex technical concepts to both technical and business audiences * 5\+ years of direct experience working with customers on cloud technology adoption AND/OR 5\+ years of direct experience working in enterprise software or SaaS industry **PREFERRED Experience presenting to both technical and non\-technical executive audiences * Experience bringing technology products to market in a fast\-paced environment * Experience with product\-led growth strategies and self\-service product adoption * Track record of creating compelling technical demonstrations and reference architectures Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. sections.responsibilities: responsibilities * Manage recurring finance mechanisms including Weekly Business Reviews (WBR), Monthly Business Reviews (MBR), and consolidate worldwide updates for planning cycles while ensuring reporting accuracy and regularly auditing work to maintain the highest standards * Build and maintain financial models and reporting tools that provide insights on business performance, identify trends, and support data\-driven decision making for Hub Delivery operations * Proactively analyze financial data to identify opportunities for process improvement and cost optimization, converting data into meaningful findings and providing clear recommendations * Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to develop financial solutions that support business growth while maintaining strong internal controls and financial compliance * Drive continuous improvement projects that scale and enhance finance operations with measurable results, demonstrating ownership and bias for action in implementing solutions A day in the life Your day starts by reviewing overnight financial performance metrics to prepare for the Weekly Business Review. You'll collaborate with team members to consolidate worldwide updates, ensuring data accuracy before presenting to leadership. Throughout the day, you'll toggle between analyzing financial trends, partnering with business teams to understand operational challenges, and developing improved reporting solutions. You might meet with other Hub Delivery Finance colleagues to align on planning cycle deliverables or work independently to automate a process that will scale across multiple regions. About the team The Hub Delivery Finance team is a small collaborative group that provides critical financial support for a fast growing worldwide delivery network. As part of the broader organization supporting Last Mile Tech, Pickup and Return Points, and FP\&A within Amazon Delivery, our team plays an essential role in driving financial discipline and enabling business growth. We pride ourselves on building inclusive partnerships across functions to deliver actionable insights that improve operational efficiency and enhance the customer

sections.responsibilities: responsibilities * Manage recurring finance mechanisms including Weekly Business Reviews (WBR), Monthly Business Reviews (MBR), and consolidate worldwide updates for planning cycles while ensuring reporting accuracy and regularly auditing work to maintain the highest standards * Build and maintain financial models and reporting tools that provide insights on business performance, identify trends, and support data\-driven decision making for Hub Delivery operations * Proactively analyze financial data to identify opportunities for process improvement and cost optimization, converting data into meaningful findings and providing clear recommendations * Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to develop financial solutions that support business growth while maintaining strong internal controls and financial compliance * Drive continuous improvement projects that scale and enhance finance operations with measurable results, demonstrating ownership and bias for action in implementing solutions A day in the life Your day starts by reviewing overnight financial performance metrics to prepare for the Weekly Business Review. You'll collaborate with team members to consolidate worldwide updates, ensuring data accuracy before presenting to leadership. Throughout the day, you'll toggle between analyzing financial trends, partnering with business teams to understand operational challenges, and developing improved reporting solutions. You might meet with other Hub Delivery Finance colleagues to align on planning cycle deliverables or work independently to automate a process that will scale across multiple regions. About the team The Hub Delivery Finance team is a small collaborative group that provides critical financial support for a fast growing worldwide delivery network. As part of the broader organization supporting Last Mile Tech, Pickup and Return Points, and FP\&A within Amazon Delivery, our team plays an essential role in driving financial discipline and enabling business growth. We pride ourselves on building inclusive partnerships across functions to deliver actionable insights that improve operational efficiency and enhance the customer
